text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10.4px; font-family: 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #15191f

g.text: Evaluation inventory follows the nine-stage Assays Roadmap

text.style: font-size: 7px; font-family: 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6872

g.text: Coverage is broad by stage count, but several covered stages remain single-source dominated.
